bool lifecycle_init (lifecycle_t * lc, const char * name)

Definition at line 10 of file platform/wasm/lifecycle.c.

10                                                        {
11   (void)name;
12   if (!lc) return false;
13   atomic_store(&lc->state, LIFECYCLE_INITIALIZED);
14   return true;
15 }

bool lifecycle_init_once (lifecycle_t * lc)


Definition at line 17 of file
    platform/wasm/lifecycle.c.


17                                           {
18   if (!lc) return false;
19 
20   // Try to transition from UNINITIALIZED to INITIALIZING
21   int expected = LIFECYCLE_UNINITIALIZED;
22   return atomic_cas_u64(&lc->state, &expected, LIFECYCLE_INITIALIZING);
23 }






References atomic_cas_u64().

  lc)

45                                                      {
46   if (!lc) return false;
47   return atomic_load(&((lifecycle_t *)lc)->state) == LIFECYCLE_INITIALIZED;
48 }
